import sys
input = sys.stdin.readline

def solve():
    n, m, q = map(int, input().split())
    locked = [[False]*(m+2) for _ in range(n+2)]
    f = [[0]*(m+2) for _ in range(n+2)]
    g = [[0]*(m+2) for _ in range(n+2)]
    
    free_count = n * m
    sf = sum(f[i][j] for i in range(1,n+1) for j in range(1,m+1))
    sg = sum(g[i][j] for i in range(1,n+1) for j in range(1,m+1))
    
    # Initialize
    for i in range(1, n+1):
        for j in range(1, m+1):
            f[i][j] = g[i][j-1] + 1
            g[i][j] = f[i-1][j] + 1
    
    sf = sum(f[i][j] for i in range(1,n+1) for j in range(1,m+1))
    sg = sum(g[i][j] for i in range(1,n+1) for j in range(1,m+1))
    
    def recompute_f(i, j):
        nonlocal sf, sg
        if i < 1 or i > n or j < 1 or j > m:
            return
        if locked[i][j] or locked[i][j-1]:
            new_f = 0
        else:
            new_f = g[i][j-1] + 1
        if new_f != f[i][j]:
            sf += new_f - f[i][j]
            f[i][j] = new_f
            recompute_g(i+1, j)
    
    def recompute_g(i, j):
        nonlocal sf, sg
        if i < 1 or i > n or j < 1 or j > m:
            return
        if locked[i][j] or locked[i-1][j]:
            new_g = 0
        else:
            new_g = f[i-1][j] + 1
        if new_g != g[i][j]:
            sg += new_g - g[i][j]
            g[i][j] = new_g
            recompute_f(i, j+1)
    
    results = []
    for _ in range(q):
        x, y = map(int, input().split())
        if locked[x][y]:
            locked[x][y] = False
            free_count += 1
        else:
            locked[x][y] = True
            free_count -= 1
        # Recompute affected cells
        # f[x][y], g[x][y], then chain
        recompute_f(x, y)
        recompute_g(x, y)
        # Also need to recompute f[x][y+1] since g[x][y] changed? handled by chain
        # Also g[x+1][y] since f[x][y] changed? handled
        results.append(free_count + sf + sg)
    
    print('\n'.join(map(str, results)))

solve()
